Localization.Description: Actions with an SKDPU NT restriction group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} changed SKDPU NT restriction group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} deleted SKDPU NT restriction group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} created SKDPU NT restriction group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
